heading: Reserve officers not on the active-duty list
label: 666 Reserve officers not on the active-duty list
text: The Secretary of Defense shall establish personnel policies emphasizing education and experience in joint matters for reserve officers not on the active-duty list. Such policies shall, to the extent practicable for the reserve components, be similar to the policies provided by this chapter.
notes: Transition to Joint Officer Personnel PolicyPersonnel policies under this section to be established not later than the end of the eight-month period beginning , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1986section 406(c) of Pub. L. 99–433section 661 of this title
